name: h100_8gpu_dgx
_comment: NVIDIA DGX H100: 80 GB HBM3 @ 3.35 TB/s, FP16 dense 989 TFLOPS/GPU per framework convention (peak_flops_TF stores FP16 dense; FP8 = 1979 by linear byte scaling), NVLink4 900 GB/s bidir (450 GB/s single-direction). 8-GPU NVLink domain via 4 NVSwitch chips. B_agg = 8 × 450 GB/s = 3.6 TB/s single-dir system aggregate.
